title: Session handoff: PR 102 comment harvest next
body: Twigged Shedding Fern completed owner-requested session handoff for PR 102 snagging. Landed outcome: e8050400 pushed; GitHub checks and Sonar are clean; four known Copilot review threads are obsolete/outdated. Next session must fetch remaining PR 102 top-level comments, review summaries, review threads with resolved/outdated state, and Sonar/check state, then analyse whether any live reviewer feedback remains before editing.
